texto: No doubt Pain as God's megaphone is a terrible instrument
autor: it may lead to final and unrepented rebellion. But it gives the only opportunity the bad man can have for amendment. It removes the veil
explicacao: Citação de it may lead to final and unrepented rebellion. But it gives the only opportunity the bad man can have for amendment. It removes the veil sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “No doubt Pain as God's megaphone is a terrible instrument” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
